ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the airport */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the airport above sea level */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Airline code that operates the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number identifier */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Aircraft ID assigned to the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Flight status (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that follows this schedule */,
  "recurring_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight occurs (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the recurring schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recurring schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that this price applies to */,
  "fare_class" TEXT /* Fare class (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  "base_price" TEXT /* Base price of the flight */,
  "taxes" TEXT /* Taxes applied to the flight */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the flight (base price + taxes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, airline staff, traveler) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the airport (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Textual comment of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport where the service is available */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_services_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the statistics recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics recorded */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers for the month */,
  "flight_count" INTEGER /* Total number of flights for the month */,
  "cargo_volume" TEXT /* Total cargo volume for the month (in tons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_statistics_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport managed */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_managers_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was delayed */,
  "delay_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delay was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility within the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_facilities_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport related to the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_news_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_controllers" (
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each controller */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code where the controller works */,
  "controller_name" TEXT /* Name of the controller */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience as an air traffic controller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("controller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_controllers_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature at the airport (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity at the airport (in percentage) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Current weather conditions at the airport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_iata_code FOREIGN KEY ("iata_code") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_route_maps" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that follows this route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight route */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the flight route (in kilometers) */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_route_maps_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., delay, cancellation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_route_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route that includes this stop */,
  "stop_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport where the stop occurs */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the stop */,
  "stop_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_route_maps ("route_id")
)
